items.plain_language: Needs work: A real device target is named for execution.

items.title: Permission/status screen visible

items.plain_language: The native status and confirmation screens are testable.
items.title: Accessibility flow tested

plain_language_summary: Echo Guardian v0.7 cannot run the physical-device execution checklist for ios. HIPAA, GDPR, medical-device, emergency-system, clinical, and silent MDM claims remain blocked.
